cards.title: Third Party Liability (Act Only)
cards.content:
ΓÇó Mandatory by Law (Motor Vehicles Act).
ΓÇó Covers injury/death to 3rd party (Unlimited Liability).
ΓÇó Covers 3rd party property damage (Limited to Γé╣7.5 Lakhs).
ΓÇó Does NOT cover damage to own vehicle.

cards.title: Comprehensive Policy (Package)
cards.content:
ΓÇó Covers Third Party + Own Damage (OD).
ΓÇó Own Damage covers theft, fire, natural disasters, and accidents.
ΓÇó Personal Accident (PA) Cover for Owner-Driver is mandatory (Γé╣15 Lakhs).

items.text: Insured Declared Value: The current market value of the vehicle (Sum Insured). It depreciates every year.
No Claim Bonus: Discount on premium for claim-free years. Ranges from 20% (1st year) to 50% (5th year).
Deduction for wear and tear. Plastics/Rubber (50%), Glass (Nil), Paint (50% of material).

cards.title: Householder's & Shopkeeper's Policy
cards.content:
ΓÇó Householder: Package policy covering fire, burglary, breakdown of appliances, and personal accident.
ΓÇó Shopkeeper: Covers building, contents, cash in transit, and liability in one policy.

sections.title: ≡ƒÆí Exam Master Tips
items: NCB belongs to the owner, NOT the car. If you sell the car, you can keep the NCB for your new car.
Driving without a valid license or under the influence of alcohol rejects all Own Damage claims.
Personal Accident cover pays 100% for death or loss of 2 limbs/eyes, and 50% for loss of 1 limb/eye.
Burglary Insurance requires "forcible and violent entry". Normal theft is NOT burglary.
Certificate of Insurance is the legal proof to be carried in the vehicle.
